svg.text: MIET Africa iOS · Facilitator Flow · Iteration 1
JWT · Face ID / Touch ID · SSO · iOS 26
Offline mode · will sync on reconnect
— Tab screens (accessible from Course list nav bar) —
Screens 1–4: core facilitator flow · Screens 5–6: tab screens, reuse learner row component from Screen 3
Biometric via LocalAuthentication · Offline via Core Data · JWT 24hr · POPIA compliant · Alerts auto-generated when attendance <80%
iOS 26 · SwiftUI · Dynamic Island · RBAC: Facilitator role · Green badge ≥80% · Amber badge <80% · Red badge = consecutive absences
